classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标区域为电机引出线连接示意，标出'动力线端子:（E0506)'、端子和胶壳型号，并通过引线连接到三相端子'U'、'V'、'W'，同时给出线色'红'、'黄'、'蓝'及线材'UL1332'，体现动力线相线与线色/端子关系。

title.title_zh: 动力线端子与线色连接示意
title.title_en: Power Wire Terminal and Color Connection Diagram

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected spacing from OCR text and retained the higher-confidence overlapping source; ocr_001 is a duplicate lower-confidence partial reading.
Corrected spacing after colon.
Restored leading L visible in the same callout.
Corrected spacing in housing part number and before color note.
Corrected spacing between NTC and length callout.
Corrected OCR misread Bed to Red based on visible wire color label.
Corrected OCR misread n to U based on visible phase label inside connector block.

terminology_notes: Connector, terminal, housing, lead length, wire color, and wire specification notes are preserved as engineering annotations rather than geometric dimensions.
translation_notes: English labels are normalized with spacing corrections; color and connector terms are translated to Chinese in dimension records.

dimension_records.reason: The callout identifies the terminal type for the power line connector.
The label is an independent connector terminal part-number note.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Power lead length L = 100 to 120 mm
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 动力线长度 L=100 至 120 mm
dimension_records.reason: The L callout is placed on the power lead route and gives a length range.
The callout identifies connector housing part number and color.
The label explicitly gives the NTC wire length.
The red color label is adjacent to the conductor marked U; OCR correction is needed for both labels.
The text is a standalone wire color label near a power lead.
The text is a standalone wire color label near a power lead.
UL1332 is a visible wire standard/specification note next to the power leads.

frontend_table_records.specification: Power lead length L = 100 to 120 mm

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 动力线长度 L=100 至 120 mm

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Visible connector-related notes include terminal 5013340000, power line terminal E0506, housing 501330 0200 white, power lead length L=100-120 mm, NTC lead length L=300 mm, wire colors Blue/Yellow/Red, U phase label, and UL1332 wire specification.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: W and V phase labels are visible in the image but have no corresponding OCR source_id in the provided OCR boxes, so they are not included as final text annotations.

unresolved_items.issue: Visible W phase label has no OCR source_id, so it cannot be output as a text_annotation under the coordinate/source constraints.
Visible V phase label has no OCR source_id, so it cannot be output as a text_annotation under the coordinate/source constraints.
ocr_001 is a lower-confidence duplicate/partial overlap of the power line terminal callout and was excluded in favor of ocr_002.

labels.translation_en_full: Align the magnet with the iron core

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内是电机剖视结构尺寸图，包含'25max'、'18±0.3'、'Φ58.5max'、'Φ46.2'、'Φ39.2'、'Φ28+0.015/0'等尺寸标注，以及基准'A'和形位公差框'0.02 A'、'0.25 A'，用于描述零部件外形、孔径、同轴和垂直度要求。

Corrected OCR 1o to visible local tolerance callout 5 +0.1/-0.1.
Corrected rotated OCR order 60-0.0200+0.0200 to standard diameter tolerance format.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Several geometric tolerances reference datum A, including perpendicularity 0.02 and a Φ0.05 datum-related tolerance.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Central shaft/bore feature includes Φ28 +0.015/0 and local 5 +0.1/-0.1 features.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible envelope-related callouts include 25max, Φ60 +0.0200/-0.0200, Φ58.5max, Φ46.2, Φ39.2, 18±0.3, 2±0.1, and bottom width 22.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: The leading numeric portion of the 4.2max callout was not detected as an OCR source, so it is not promoted to a dimension record.

unresolved_items.issue: OCR captured only 'max'; visible text appears to be a full maximum dimension such as 4.2max, but the numeric portion lacks an OCR source_id.
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Keep as unresolved unless a source box for the leading numeric text is available.

unresolved_items.issue: Overlapping or fragmented OCR around the left rotated diameter/tolerance stack; higher-quality source ocr_018 and ocr_014 were used for final records.
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Do not use these fragments independently.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是'电机性能参数Motor performance parameters'表格，包含额定转矩、最大转矩、额定转速、最大转速、连续静态转矩等扭矩与转速性能参数及单位'N.m'、'rpm'，全图中该表位于右侧蓝色标注框内，与电机性能数据相关，最接近扭矩转速性能类。

regions.content:
1. 带★要求，为产品重要和关键特性
    Requirements marked with ★ indicate important and critical features of the product
  2. 引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损伤
    The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged
  3. 定子引出线参照GB/T 7345-2008要求
    The stator outgoing line shall comply with the requirements of GB/T 7345-2008
  4. 对于定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.0N的拉力
    For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.0N
regions.content_en:
1. Lead wires must not be disconnected; insulation and conductor must not be damaged
    The outgoing line cannot be disconnected, and the insulation layer and wire core cannot be damaged

  2. For stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pull of 9.0 N
    For stator three-phase wires, each lead out wire should be able to withstand a tensile force of 9.0N

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'线束定义表Wire Singal Defintion'，表格列出'U相 MOTOR U'、'V相 MOTOR V'、'W相 MOTOR W'等电机三相动力线及对应线色'红 RE'、'黄 YE'、'蓝 BL'和线径'20 AWG'，同时包含NTC线束信息，工程含义最接近动力接口或电机电源线束接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标框内为'TN 曲线图 TN Graph'，包含转矩纵轴、转速横轴、rpm 单位、N.m 单位，以及短时工作区和连续工作区曲线边界，标注点为'(3500,1.4)'和'(3600,0.7)'，工程含义是电机扭矩随转速变化的工作区域曲线。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于完整图纸底部标题栏附近，内容为'未注线性公差'及各尺寸范围对应的±公差值，属于机械图纸尺寸公差说明，不涉及曲线或连接器针脚定义。
